Amplitude: contact-sales fixture produced a visible-price classification, indicating pricing precision risk for enterprise pages
New Relic: pricing expected as visible, but no currency-plus-billing candidate passed deterministic evidence rules
Perplexity: pricing expected as visible, but no currency-plus-billing candidate passed deterministic evidence rules
Cursor: pricing expected as visible, but extracted evidence only supported a contact-sales pricing path
root_cause_groups.likely_root_cause: pricing pages are non-standard, require interaction, or expose prices in layouts the deterministic extractor does not yet model
root_cause_groups.recommended_fix: add targeted pricing-only retries and support plan tables/toggles without blocking first insight

examples: Bubble: only 0 reliable feature facts were extracted; target is at least 3 clear feature/product signals
PostHog: only 1 reliable feature facts were extracted; target is at least 3 clear feature/product signals
New Relic: only 0 reliable feature facts were extracted; target is at least 3 clear feature/product signals
Perplexity: only 0 reliable feature facts were extracted; target is at least 3 clear feature/product signals
Render: only 1 reliable feature facts were extracted; target is at least 3 clear feature/product signals
root_cause_groups.likely_root_cause: feature sections are sparse, card-like, or mixed with testimonial/proof content
root_cause_groups.recommended_fix: improve feature-card/table parsing and keep testimonial/proof text out of features

examples: Carrd: no non-auth hero/link/button CTA survived ranking
Bubble: no non-auth hero/link/button CTA survived ranking
Simple Analytics: no non-auth hero/link/button CTA survived ranking
Perplexity: no non-auth hero/link/button CTA survived ranking
Render: no non-auth hero/link/button CTA survived ranking
root_cause_groups.likely_root_cause: CTA extraction is still too dependent on detected links/buttons and can miss intended hero actions
root_cause_groups.recommended_fix: prioritize hero/above-the-fold CTAs over nav/footer and classify passive CTAs separately

examples: Perplexity: positioning lacked a clear category, target customer, use case, or non-generic value proposition
Copper: positioning lacked a clear category, target customer, use case, or non-generic value proposition
root_cause_groups.likely_root_cause: homepage copy lacks explicit category/audience/use-case signals or those signals are not prioritized
root_cause_groups.recommended_fix: limit fallback to title/meta/H1/hero/first paragraph and downgrade broad slogans

examples: Perplexity: all discovered candidate pages failed or returned no meaningful static text
root_cause_groups.likely_root_cause: target site blocks automated requests, exposes an empty app shell, or returns unusable static HTML
root_cause_groups.recommended_fix: classify blocked/JS-heavy sites clearly and optionally retry in background with browser fallback

examples: Perplexity: baseline did not produce enough structured profile hashes or watchlist suggestions
root_cause_groups.likely_root_cause: structured facts were too sparse to create a useful watchlist
root_cause_groups.recommended_fix: generate watchlist from available dimensions and label missing dimensions explicitly

improvements.title: Improve pricing page discovery and table/FAQ price extraction for pages where pricing is linked but not obvious from /pricing.
Add a validation-mode fetch budget and per-domain retry backoff for slow or blocking sites.
Keep the V7 100-scenario suite as a prelaunch regression check before future READY claims.
